title: At Five, Country Hill Signs Brand Ambassadors, Assures Affordable Luxury for Clients
description: Fox Capital Investment Limited through its real estate company, Country Hills Affordable Homes has announced the signing of four famous brand ambassadors and influencers to become the face of the comp
html:
Fox Capital Investment Limited through its real estate company, Country Hills Affordable Homes has announced the signing of four famous brand ambassadors and influencers to become the face of the company in the next year.

The official signing of the four ambassadors includes the Nollywood stars, Seilat Adebowale; Adebimpe Abiodun popularly known as Wasilat Coded; Popular Comedian Orevaghene Akuidolo also known as Forever and Brand Influencer Omotara Akanni (Lady Motara).

The signing of the ambassadors according to the MD/CEO of the real estate company, Mr. Adewale Oshinaike said it’s to commemorate the fifth anniversary and to further reinstate their commitment to providing affordable homes to its prospective clients.

He pointed that the real estate company is one of the fast-growing real estate firms with a strong focus on providing affordable housing luxuries to all and leveraging the integrity and resilience in real estate practice has led the course of making housing and land property luxury acquisition available and affordable in the best interests of all stakeholders; customers, market and society.  

Also Speaking on the ambassadors signing, the company’s Executive Director in charge of Legal and Investment, Mr. Emmanuel Bello explained that the purpose of signing the brand ambassadors is part of efforts to project the company core values in the best possible image for media visibility and presence.   

“We intend to have the right media presence and framework for our core value as a real estate company making real estate luxury available and affordable. With us at Country Hill Affordable Homes, having your own property or investment in real estate doesn’t require you to must be a millionaire.”, he added.

According to the Executive Director, the ambassadors were carefully selected across entertainment genres as they fit into the brand project with their tremendous growth.

 “A lot of synergies have been happening already between us and in the next one year of this endorsement deal, we want to grow with them in a symbiotic relationship as we grow our net worth together.

The Ambassadors according to the deal signed are expected to promote the real estate brand online and offline, go on-site tours, be available for clients’ land allocation, and be present at corporate events hosted by the company.    

The four newly signed brand ambassadors now joined comedian Bukunmi Nathaniel (Bukunmi Preacher), Bunmi Shogbade, and the trio of Segun, Damilare, and Olubori Ojo, “Seriously Bori” making the brand ambassadors and influencers become nine individuals on the list.   

Speaking as brand ambassador, Nollywood star, Adebimpe Akintunde popularly known as ‘Wasilat Coded’ noted that Country Hill has come to stay with a strong mission statement in the industry.

She however promised to contribute to the success of the brand. She further enjoined people to minimize their fashion spending and invest more into real estate as it comes with a high rate of return of investment.  

Forever, one of the brand ambassadors assured people of their money as they subscribe to a credible and reliable real estate firm whose plans for its clients is making landed property acquisition luxury available and affordable.
